mapper.sql: sei.employee_id, sei.work_card, sei.name, sei.group_id, sei.operation_code, sei.error_msg, sei.data_status, sei.lump_sum_wage, sei.post_skill_salary, sei.target_performance_pay, sei.base_pay, sei.personal_deductibles, sei.company_deductibles, sei.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, sei.company_deduct_accumulation_fund, sei.high_temperature_subsidy, sei.safety_accumulation_award, sei.seniority_allowance, sei.transportation_allowance, sei.one_child_subsidy, sei.post_subsidy, sei.id, sei.create_time, sei.create_by, sei.update_time, sei.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.lump_sum_wage as ${tAlias}_lump_sum_wage, ${tAlias}.post_skill_salary as ${tAlias}_post_skill_salary, ${tAlias}.target_performance_pay as ${tAlias}_target_performance_pay, ${tAlias}.base_pay as ${tAlias}_base_pay, ${tAlias}.personal_deductibles as ${tAlias}_personal_deductibles, ${tAlias}.company_deductibles as ${tAlias}_company_deductibles, ${tAlias}.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, ${tAlias}.company_deduct_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_company_deduct_accumulation_fund, ${tAlias}.high_temperature_subsidy as ${tAlias}_high_temperature_subsidy, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into swm_employee_interface (employee_id, work_card, name, group_id, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, lump_sum_wage, post_skill_salary, target_performance_pay, base_pay, personal_deductibles, company_deductibles, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, company_deduct_accumulation_fund, high_temperature_subsidy, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lumpSumWage,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{postSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{targetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{basePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{personalDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{companyDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{personalDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{companyDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{highTemperatureSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update swm_employee_interface set employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, lump_sum_wage = #{lumpSumWage,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, post_skill_salary = #{postSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, target_performance_pay = #{targetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, base_pay = #{basePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, personal_deductibles = #{personalDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, company_deductibles = #{companyDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund = #{personalDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, company_deduct_accumulation_fund = #{companyDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, high_temperature_subsidy = #{highTemperatureSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert: insert into swm_employee_history (work_card,employee_name,post_skill_salary,target_performance_pay,division_contract_flag,range_change, create_time,create_by,update_time,update_by,remarks ,se_id,lump_sum_wage ,base_pay,post_subsidy,seniority_allowance,personal_deductibles,company_deductibles, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund,company_deduct_accumulation_fund) select sei.work_card,sei.name,ISNULL(sei.post_skill_salary, se.post_skill_salary),isnull(sei.target_performance_pay,se.target_performance_pay), se.division_contract_flag, isnull(isnull(sei.post_skill_salary,isnull(se.post_skill_salary,0)) +isnull(sei.target_performance_pay,isnull(se.target_performance_pay,0)) +isnull(sei.lump_sum_wage,isnull(se.lump_sum_wage,0)) +isnull(sei.base_pay,isnull(se.base_pay,0)) -isnull(se.post_skill_salary,0)-isnull(se.target_performance_pay,0)-isnull(se.lump_sum_wage,0)-isnull(se.base_pay,0),0) as range_change ,sei.create_time, sei.create_by,sei.update_time,sei.update_by,'EXCEL批量导入', se.id,isnull(sei.lump_sum_wage,se.lump_sum_wage),isnull(sei.base_pay,se.base_pay), sei.post_subsidy,sei.seniority_allowance,sei.personal_deductibles,sei.company_deductibles, sei.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund,sei.company_deduct_accumulation_fund from swm_employee se join swm_employee_interface sei on se.employee_id = sei.employee_id AND se.work_flag = 1 AND sei.data_status='T' and sei.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
